basic_details.job_title: IIT Madras System Administrator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras) System Administrator Notification 2026 has been released on 14 May 2026 on the official website IIT Madras. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Madras System Administrator Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's degree in computer science / information technology / Electronics and Communication Engineering / Computer Applications
qualification.details: System Administrator: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science / Information Technology / Electronics and Communication Engineering / Computer Applications or in a related discipline with a minimum of 3 years of experience in an R&D lab.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Madras System Administrator Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 03-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Madras to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Madras System Administrator position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the System Administrator post at IIT Madras is June 3, 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the System Administrator role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Electronics and Communication Engineering, Computer Applications, or a related discipline. A minimum of 3 years of experience in an R&D lab is also mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, as per the provided data, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the System Administrator position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the System Administrator post will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 75,000 to Rs. 95,000.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the System Administrator post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the System Administrator position at IIT Madras through this recruitment notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the IIT Madras System Administrator recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves shortlisting of eligible candidates, followed by a test or interview, and finally document verification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this job?
faq.answer: Applications for the System Administrator position at IIT Madras must be submitted online through the official website or the provided application link.

faq.question: Q8. Where is IIT Madras located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Madras is located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, with the pincode 600036.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The System Administrator position at IIT Madras is a contractual role, meaning it is offered on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link can be found in the "Important Links" section of this article. It is recommended to download and review it thoroughly.
